scripts.lint:rust: cd contracts && cargo clippy --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all -- --check
scripts.circuits:setup: yarn circuits:ptau && npx snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/payroll/build/payroll.r1cs circuits/payroll/ptau/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau circuits/payroll/build/payroll_0000.zkey && npx snarkjs zkey contribute circuits/payroll/build/payroll_0000.zkey circuits/payroll/build/payroll_final.zkey --name='ZetaPay local contribution' -v -e='zetapay payroll groth16 local entropy' && npx snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuits/payroll/build/payroll_final.zkey circuits/payroll/build/verification_key.json
scripts.circuits:prove: npx snarkjs groth16 prove circuits/payroll/build/payroll_final.zkey circuits/payroll/build/witness.wtns circuits/payroll/build/proof.json circuits/payroll/build/public.json
scripts.circuits:verify: npx snarkjs groth16 verify circuits/payroll/build/verification_key.json circuits/payroll/build/public.json circuits/payroll/build/proof.json
scripts.circuits:all: yarn circuits:inputs && yarn circuits:witness && yarn circuits:prove && yarn circuits:verify && yarn circuits:fixtures
scripts.circuits:rebuild: yarn circuits:clean && yarn circuits:compile && yarn circuits:setup && yarn circuits:all
scripts.contracts:deploy:verifier: stellar contract deploy --wasm contracts/target/wasm32v1-none/release/zetapay_verifier.wasm --source-account zetapay-deployer --network testnet --alias zetapay-verifier
scripts.contracts:deploy:payroll: stellar contract deploy --wasm contracts/target/wasm32v1-none/release/zetapay_payroll.wasm --source-account zetapay-deployer --network testnet --alias zetapay-payroll
scripts.contracts:deploy: yarn contracts:build && yarn contracts:deploy:verifier && yarn contracts:deploy:payroll
